arts.ttl: Barcelona considering move for 14 G/A Liverpool star after missing out on Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a transfer swoop for Liverpool forward Luis Diaz as they look at multiple options in that area of the pitch. arts.ttl: Man Utd identify new wonderkid target
arts.sum: Should Man Utd decide to formalise their interest and actually make a move for Esposito, it would be a deal firmly in line with INEOS' new transfer policy. The 19-year-old's form has not gone unnoticed and journalist Alfredo Pedulla and Sportitalia report that the youngster has appeared on the radar of Premier League clubs Leicester and Man Utd .

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka set target by Mikel Arteta after training ground return
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is expected to be sidelined until March after undergoing hamstring surgery last month following Arsenal's 5-1 win at Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim could do something for the first time in Manchester United predicted XI vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to embark on another memorable FA Cup adventure when they face Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'I cried for hours over Man Utd and Real Madrid deal collapsing – it cost me big'
arts.sum: A Real Madrid legend has revealed how he was on the verge of joining Manchester United but was later left in tears when his move to the Premier League powerhouse collapsed

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Ronald Araujo but there's a catch for star who rejected two rivals
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on signing Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo, who has previously turned down offers from rivals Liverpool and Chelsea. Araujo's decision to turn down a move to the Premier League in 2022, despite lucrative offers from both Liverpool and Chelsea, will certainly endear him to the Gunners' fans if a transfer does go ahead.
